What does this PR do, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] New offensive simulation module/technique
- [ ] New defensive detection module/rule
- [ ] New AI-analysis plugin
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation

## Related issue

Closes #

## Safety checklist (required for offensive/defensive changes)

- [ ] No real credential exfiltration, destructive action, or contact with
      systems outside an explicit, user-provided scope
- [ ] Maps to a MITRE ATT&CK technique ID (offensive) or a documented
      finding/technique (defensive)
- [ ] Findings/output are structured (JSON) and explainable, not just a
      bare pass/fail or score

## Testing

- [ ] Added/updated tests under `tests/`
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Lint (`flake8`/`black`) passes locally

Describe how you tested this change:

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated the relevant module README
- [ ] Updated the top-level README if this changes usage or scope

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused (one module/fix) and has a clear title
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
